intro: Tanacetum zangezuricum, also known as Caucasian tansy, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and carminative properties. The bioactive constituents of Tanacetum zangezuricum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Caucasian tansy is commonly used to prepare teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to treat respiratory issues, relieve pain, and promote relaxation.
